title: Avali Scratch
description: This pack changes the Default Minecraft Font to Avali Scratch!
body:
This Pack Changes the Font for Minecraft to Avali Scratch. Me and My BF are trying to learn it and decided that using it in Minecraft would be the trick to use it more often.


The Font itself was made by SomeGuyNamedDavid; I've just Ported it to Minecraft (https://fontstruct.com/fontstructions/show/1108804/avali_scratch) (Under CC Share Alike)
